name: stadiumops-copilot-root
description: StadiumOps Copilot - Explainable AI Assistant for Stadium Volunteers & Staff

scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build:netlify: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
